title: crotalaria anisophylla
intro: Crotalaria anisophylla, also known as Anisophylla crotalaria or Anisophylla, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Crotalaria anisophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other plants in traditional medicine.
